title: Press Release | UN Public Service Awards to honor 12 initiatives for accelerating progress on the Sustainable Development Goals
content:
Press release UN Public Service Awards to honor 12 initiatives for accelerating progress on the Sustainable Development Goals Winning initiatives advance inclusivity, gender equality, transparency and participation in public service delivery New York, 22 June 2026 – Twelve initiatives from Azerbaijan, Brazil, Cambodia, the Dominican Republic, Indonesia, the Philippines, Saudi Arabia and Thailand will be recognized [...]

The post Press Release | UN Public Service Awards to honor 12 initiatives for accelerating progress on the Sustainable Development Goals appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Ebola in DR Congo: One month on, scaled up response remains insufficient
content:
One month after the Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak was declared in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda, case numbers continue to rise.  Read Full Story on UN News

The post Ebola in DR Congo: One month on, scaled up response remains insufficient appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: DR Congo: Efforts ramp up as Ebola outbreak accelerates beyond borders
content:
The spread of Ebola is accelerating in the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) amid continued armed violence, posing a grave and growing risk to the region, UN agencies warned on Friday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post DR Congo: Efforts ramp up as Ebola outbreak accelerates beyond borders appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Ebola treatment capacity expands in DR Congo as WHO issues new guidelines
content:
Treatment capacity for the rare and deadly Bundibugyo species of Ebola is expanding in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), as the World Health Organization (WHO) warns that community mistrust remains a major challenge to ending the outbreak. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Ebola treatment capacity expands in DR Congo as WHO issues new guidelines appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Climate crisis: UN chief lays out solutions blueprint for clean energy transition
content:
As a deadly heatwave continued to grip Europe on Tuesday, UN Secretary-General António Guterres issued an impassioned appeal for more ambitious global action on climate change caused by fossil fuels, to prevent irreversible damage. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Climate crisis: UN chief lays out solutions blueprint for clean energy transition appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: WHO commends Uganda’s Ebola response, urges vigilance and regional cooperation
content:
The head of the World Health Organization (WHO) has praised Uganda’s response to an Ebola outbreak that has spread from neighbouring Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), while warning that continued vigilance and cross-border cooperation will be critical to stopping transmission. Read Full Story on UN News

title: DR Congo: Ebola spreads as agencies brace for child victims
content:
The deadly Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) is continuing to spread with a spike in child infections an increasingly likely scenario in the days ahead, UN agencies said on Friday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post DR Congo: Ebola spreads as agencies brace for child victims appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: World News in Brief: Turk condemns Northern Ireland riots, jobs at risk over animal disease spread, heatwaves spark public health crisis in Europe
content:
Violence spread across Belfast following a shocking knife attack allegedly carried out by a Sudanese asylum seeker on Monday, triggering a wave of anti-immigration unrest. The victim suffered significant injuries to his face and back. Read Full Story on UN News

The post World News in Brief: Turk condemns Northern Ireland riots, jobs at risk over animal disease spread, heatwaves spark public health crisis in Europe appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.
